caption:
First custom build is finally done 🎉

Tofu65, lubed Boba U4Ts, GMK Olivia clones. Sounds like a dream and types even better. Took me three evenings of debugging the PCB but worth it.

#mechanicalkeyboards #keebs #seattle

Sunday stir-fry night 🍜

Garlic-ginger chicken with bok choy over rice. Cooking 3-4 nights a week now and it's the best decompression after a day of Go.

#homecooking #stirfry #seattlefood

Rattlesnake Ledge never gets old 🏔️

Early start beat the crowds. Worth the burning calves for this view of the reservoir.

#hiking #cascades #seattle #rattlesnakeledge

Saturday brunch ritual at Cafe Luna ☀️

Avocado toast and a cold brew after the Burke-Gilman run. The window seat is unbeatable.

#cafeluna #brunch #seattle #homecooking

Keycap haul day 📦

Swipe for the full set. These artisans have been on a year-long group buy and they finally shipped. The spacebar alone is a piece of art.

#mechanicalkeyboards #keycaps #keebs

Carbonara done right (lactose-friendly twist) 🍝

Guanciale, egg yolks, lots of pepper, zero cream. Mom's tip: take the pan off heat before the eggs go in.

#homecooking #pasta #carbonara

New RTX build is alive 🖥️

RTX 4070, 32GB, clean cable management for once. Ran Hades at max for three hours to 'stress test' it. Purely scientific.

#pcbuild #gaming #rtx4070 #seattle

Mount Si, conquered 🥾

Four miles up, legs gone, but the haystack view at the top is unreal. Trail snacks: trail mix and stubbornness.

#hiking #cascades #mountsi #seattle

Lubing switches at midnight is a personality trait 🛠️

70 switches, one tiny brush, a podcast, and zero regrets. The new board is going to be buttery.

#mechanicalkeyboards #keebs #golang

Pike Place on a rare sunny Seattle morning 🌅

Grabbed beans from Elm and wandered the market. The city actually glows when the clouds break.

#seattle #pikeplace #pnw

Build log: Ridgeline homelab rack 🧰

Swipe through the cluster glow-up. Three nodes, way too many cables, and a status dashboard I actually check daily now.

#homelab #kubernetes #selfhosted #golang

Stir-fry rice bowl, round 47 🍚

Teriyaki tofu, charred broccoli, sesame everything. The wok was a worthy investment.

#homecooking #stirfry #ricebowl

Lake Twentytwo, dripping ferns and waterfalls 🌿

Rainy PNW hike but honestly the mist made it better. Boots soaked, spirits high.

#hiking #cascades #laketwentytwo #pnw

Endgame board? Maybe. ⌨️

GMK on a brass-weighted 65%. The typing sound clip in stories is pure ASMR. I might be done buying keebs (lie).

#mechanicalkeyboards #keebs #gmk

Homemade ramen attempt #3 🍜

Finally cracked a 12-hour shoyu broth. Soft egg, scallions, chili oil. Cooking is just debugging with better outcomes.

#homecooking #ramen #seattlefood

Cascade Code Collective build night 💻

Great turnout at the meetup. Shipped a tiny Go CLI live and ate way too much pizza. Love this crew.

#golang #seattle #devcommunity

Mailbox Peak humbled me 🥵

The old trail is basically a stairmaster from hell. Made it to the actual mailbox at the summit though. Left a note.

#hiking #cascades #mailboxpeak #pnw

Desk setup refresh 🖥️⌨️

Swipe for the full tour. New mat, cleaner cables, the brass keeb front and center. A homelab dashboard always on the second monitor.

#mechanicalkeyboards #homelab #seattle #golang

Pesto pasta with basil from the windowsill 🌱🍝

Finally a herb plant that survived my care. Toasted pine nuts, lemon, parm. Quick weeknight win.

#homecooking #pasta #pesto

Golden hour over Lake Union 🌇

Walked home the long way after work. Seattle in early fall, when the light hits the water just right. No edits needed.

#seattle #lakeunion #pnw

Solder, switches, satisfaction 🔧

Hotswap-free this time — hand-soldered the whole 60% with a friend's iron. Sounds incredible. Build log on the blog soon.

#mechanicalkeyboards #keebs #golang #seattle

Sunday roast-veg sheet pan + a tidy keeb 🍠⌨️

Meal-prepping before on-call week. Easy, cozy, and the desk is finally clean. Onward.

#homecooking #mealprep #mechanicalkeyboards #seattle
Billing-service integration refactor is the sprint focus this week.
Pair-programmed the provisioning API with Priya over lunch.
On-call rotation next week; reviewing runbooks and escalation paths.
Go is the daily driver, Python for the small tooling around it.
Squad shooter with Jake tonight, solo roguelike on the weekend.
Cleaned the dust filters on the PC at 1 AM, evens out the day.
Sunday call with Dad in Sacramento, practical and warm as always.
Mom's care package came — snacks and socks; answered 60% of her texts.
Mia sent a meme and a track, roasting me with love as usual.
Marcus left good code-review feedback on the PR today.
Gym at Cascade Fitness before work — lift, then cardio.
Saturday run on the Burke-Gilman if the weather holds.
Stir-fry tonight; texted Mom for the mac and cheese clarification.
Cold brew from Elm Coffee, one at home and one at the office.
Half-built side project in Notion, abandoned right as it got good.
IPA Friday with Jake at Pike Street Grill.
Terraform and Docker changes merged, Kubernetes rollout clean.
Reading Designing Data-Intensive Applications on the bus.
Equity unlocks around August, the one-year mark at Ridgeline.
Day hike in the Cascades planned if the forecast cooperates.
Lo-fi playlist for focus; I refuse to share the decompression one.
Leo pinged on Discord with a tech article and a voice chat.
Naan and Curry for dinner — chicken tikka and garlic naan.
Planning the Japan trip to meet extended family, finally.
